<a id="__codelineno-370-6" name="__codelineno-370-6" href="#__codelineno-370-6"></a> <span class="n">headers</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">"APIKEY"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">api_key</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"Accept"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">"application/json"</span><span class="p">}</span> <a id="__codelineno-370-7" name="__codelineno-370-7" href="#__codelineno-370-7"></a> <a id="__codelineno-370-8" name="__codelineno-370-8" href="#__codelineno-370-8"></a> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">indicator_type</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">"ip"</span><span class="p">:</span> <a id="__codelineno-370-9" name="__codelineno-370-9" href="#__codelineno-370-9"></a> <span class="n">url</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">base_url</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">/search/list"</span> <a id="__codelineno-370-10" name="__codelineno-370-10" href="#__codelineno-370-10"></a> <span class="n">payload</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span> <a id="__codelineno-370-11" name="__codelineno-370-11" href="#__codelineno-370-11"></a> <span class="s2">"filter"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">"ipv4"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">indicator</span><span class="p">}</span> <a id="__codelineno-370-12" name="__codelineno-370-12" href="#__codelineno-370-12"></a> <span class="p">}</span> <a id="__codelineno-370-13" name="__codelineno-370-13" href="#__codelineno-370-13"></a> <span class="n">resp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">requests</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">post</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">url</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">payload</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">headers</span><span class="o">=</span><span <span class="n">url</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">"</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">base_url</span><span class="si">}</span><span <span class="s2">""</span><span class="p">))</span> <a id="__codelineno-372-28" name="__codelineno-372-28" href="#__codelineno-372-28"></a> <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">timeline</span> </code></pre></div> <h2 id="validation-criteria_1">Validation Criteria<a class="headerlink" href="#validation-criteria_1" title="Permanent link">¶</a></h2> <ul> <li>Shodan/Censys queries return infrastructure details for target IPs</li> <li>Passive DNS reveals historical domain-IP mappings</li> <li>Certificate transparency search finds associated domains</li> <li>Infrastructure pivoting discovers new related indicators</li> <li>Timeline shows infrastructure evolution over time</li> <li>Results are exportable as STIX 2.1 Infrastructure objects</li> </ul> <h2 id="references_7">References<a class="headerlink" href="#references_7" title="Permanent link">¶</a></h2> <ul> <li><a href="https://developer.shodan.io/api">Shodan API Documentation</a></li> <li><a href="https://search.censys.io/api">Censys Search API</a></li> <li><a href="https://securitytrails.com/corp/api">SecurityTrails API</a></li> <li><a href="https://crt.sh/">crt.sh Certificate Transparency</a></li> <li><a href="https://api.passivetotal.org/api/docs/">PassiveTotal API</a></li> <li><a href="https://github.com/salesforce/jarm">JARM Fingerprinting</a></li> </ul> <hr /> <p>2026 Galyarder Labs. Galyarder Framework.</p> </article> </div> <script>var target=document.getElementById(location.hash.slice(1));target&&target.name&&(target.checked=target.name.startsWith("__tabbed_"))</script> </div> <button type="button" class="md-top md-icon" data-md-component="top" hidden> <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M13 20h-2V8l-5.5 5.5-1.42-1.42L12 4.16l7.92 7.92-1.42 1.42L13 8z"/></svg> Back to top </button> </main> <footer class="md-footer"> <div class="md-footer-meta md-typeset"> <div class="md-footer-meta__inner md-grid"> <div class="md-social"> <a href="https://github.com/galyarderlabs/galyarder-framework" target="_blank" rel="noopener" title="github.com" class="md-social__link"> <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512"><!--!
